content.en:
Blood Fujiko's status is much more noble than that of other Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, and even more noble than ordinary Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons.

It can be said that killing a blood vine is more heartbroken than killing a nine-fold Dao Void Demon.

It stands to reason that in the case of the Su Domain Lord being stopped, only multiple Ninefold Dao Realm can surround and kill the Blood Vine.

So, Blood Fujiko never thought that she would be killed.

......

The Dao Void Demon was defeated, and a large number of clansmen were killed.

The blood hub was in a very bad mood, he took a look, and found that many of the Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demons had not returned, and even the Blood Vine and the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon had not returned.

"Where's the blood vine?"

Bloodhub asked.

A Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon hurriedly reported, "Lord Blood Hub, His Highness the Blood Vine has fallen!"

"What, Blood Fujiko has fallen?"

The Blood Hub felt that he was in big trouble, the loss this time was too great, and he would inevitably be sent to the Blood River Fortress.

As soon as he thought of this, he looked desperate.

Winter Night's Fortress.

This time, Ye Tian had a lot of combat exploits, and after the innate origin domain alliance deduced, he directly gave him 300 million combat merits.

With so many combat exploits, Ye Tian did not continue to exchange materials like blood stones, because after he broke through to the sevenfold supreme Dao realm, the supreme blood spiritual liquid would not be of much help to him, and he needed a massive amount of supreme blood spiritual liquid to have any hope of raising his cultivation to the peak of the sevenfold supreme Dao realm.

It is not cost-effective to exchange combat exploits for materials such as blood stones.

So, he applied to exchange it for the Black Abyss Devouring Stone.

"The Black Abyss Devouring Stone won't help the Innate Origin Alliance much, they should agree, right?" Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon.

The Innate Origin Alliance replied.

"Agreed!"

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to exchange his combat exploits for a bunch of Black Abyss Devouring Stones.

......

"Ye Domain Lord, the items have been delivered!"

The black-clad guard put down his things and left.

"It's indeed the Black Abyss Devouring Stone!"

Seeing these Black Abyss Devouring Stones, he was in a very good mood.

With so many Black Abyss Devouring Stones, there is a high probability that he will be able to raise his Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the realm of more than sixty percent.

Moreover, he can also exchange his combat merits in the future, and when this calamity is over, he will most likely be able to comprehend the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the Ten Percent Perfection Realm.

At that time, how terrifying his strength will be!

"Cultivate!"

Ye Tian began his penance, relying on Devouring and Refining the Black Abyss Devouring Stone to comprehend the rules of the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's Fifth Sequence Dao Rules improved rapidly.

Before you know it, another attack from the Void Demon side has arrived.

However, the Winter Night Fortress did not encounter too fierce attacks, it was just a simple impact of the Supreme Dao Monster and a few Supreme Void Demon cannon fodder, dragging the Winter Night Fortress to the Supreme Dao Realm.

Obviously, the Void Demon side of the Supreme Dao has temporarily given up attacking the Winter Night Fortress.

The main thing is still not worth it!

The Innate Origin Domain on this side of the Winter Night Fortress is not strong, there are not many origins, and it is not worth continuing to invest in combat power at all, if it continues to lose, even if those Innate Origin Domains are devoured, it will not be able to make up for the losses.

The Supreme Dao Void Demons are not brainless to die, their purpose is to cultivate more Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons, and some of them will continue to attack.

If they knew they would lose money, they wouldn't attack!

......

"If the Dao Void Demon doesn't invade, I'll be much more relaxed, and I just have more time to cultivate. Ye Tian thought so.

Unconsciously, more than 3,000 years of the Dao Era have passed.

The Void Demon has invaded many times, but nothing has happened to the Winter Night Fortress.

However, the pressure on other fortresses is very high, and more than thirty fortresses have been breached, although the Innate Origin Domain Alliance sent a large army to support in time, but some of the Innate Origin Domains were still broken by the Supreme Dao Void Demon, devouring the Origin, and the entire Innate Origin Domain was turned into countless fragments.

And the Supreme Dao Void Demon relied on devouring the Innate Origin Domain Origin, and gave birth to a number of top-notch Ninefold Dao Void Demons.

For the Supreme Dao Void Demon side, it doesn't matter how much the Supreme Dao Void Demon loses, or even a few ordinary Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons, as long as a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm with a top-level bloodline is born, then it will make a lot of money!

this day.

The Lord of the Su Domain came to find Ye Tian.

"Ye Domain Lord, according to the above requirements, I hope you will send clones to support other fortresses. Su Yu Lord said.

"Yes, which fortress to support?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Eternal Night Fortress!" Su Domain Lord said: "The invasion that just retreated, the Eternal Night Fortress Fortress Fortress "

"Okay, I'll go over here!"

Ye Tian directly dispatched two replica bodies, which was equivalent to the combat power of two Ninefold Dao Realms.

......

Fortress of the Eternal Night.

Ye Tian was stationed here, and he was in retreat and cultivation in the mansion, and he didn't care about anything else.

After a period of time, the Supreme Dao Void Demon invaded again, and Ye Tian's action caught the Supreme Dao Void Demon here out of reach, and a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons were killed, successfully surviving the Eternal Night Fortress through the crisis.

But.

One day after hundreds of years of the Dao Era, a top-notch Ninefold Dao Void Demon directly attacked and killed Ye Tian, and Ye Tian's two replica bodies desperately dragged for a while, which allowed the support of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance to arrive.

But two of his replica bodies were killed in battle, and the Great Array of the Eternal Night Fortress was damaged, but not severely.

"That top ninefold supreme Dao Void Demon is too shameless, it's just an eternal night fortress, he actually ran to attack!" Ye Tian was very helpless.

Of course, the loss of two replica bodies was nothing to him, and he quickly replenished two more replica bodies, which made the Su Yu Lord stunned.

Time flies.

There are probably only more than a thousand years left before the tribulation has passed, and at this time, the invasion of the Dao Void Demon has decreased a lot, but the Innate Origin Alliance does not dare to relax.

And.

Many of the forces of the Innate Origin Domain were transferred to the Blood River Fortress.

The Supreme Dao Void Demon also placed many Supreme Dao Void Demons in the Blood River Fortress.

Winter Night's Fortress.

"Ye Domain Lord, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance has asked us all to go to the Blood River Fortress, you have to send at least three clones!" said the Su Domain Lord.

"Other places are not defending?" Ye Tian wondered.

Su Yu said: "The high-level deduction, the Supreme Dao Void Demon will go all out to attack the Blood River Fortress, the Blood River Fortress is connected to the six top-level Innate Origin Domains, if the origin of these six Innate Origin Domains is devoured by the Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon with the strongest bloodline, it is enough for it to comprehend the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules." On the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, there is an Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon who has comprehended the rules of the fifth sequence of the Supreme Dao to the realm of ten percent, and has a supreme bloodline. Once he comprehends the rules of the Fourth Sequence of the Supreme Dao, he can break through to the realm of the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon, and his combat power can be called invincible in the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.
